repairPolicy.color: accept official #RGB/#RRGGBB/#RRGGBBAA, rgb/rgba hex, rgb/rgba comma numeric, 0x hex, and decimal uint32 forms while preserving line/command guardrails
repairPolicy.gradient: space-separated official color tokens, optional final integer deg angle, at least one color, max 10 colors
repairPolicy.vector: exactly two space-separated finite floats; comma forms rejected as not source-backed
repairPolicy.deferred: line-safe string/path/regex/numeric-list consumer semantics remain deferred

sourceRefs: ParserUtils.cpp for color/int grammar
